case_title: CACV OF COLORADO,LLC VS. SONIA E. RIVAS

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DUFEK, DAVE SEAN SUBSTITUTED FOR DAVIS, RUSSELL A AS ATTORNEY FOR CACV OF COLORADO,LLC
ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO,LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT RIVAS, SONIA E.  AKA SONIA E. CANJURA-RIVAS $3,392.99 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.53 INTEREST, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,668.52, (CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD) SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558.
